---
title: ""
page-layout: full
toc: false
---

::: {.hero}
# Sam Brien

**Workforce planning, forecasting, and operations analytics.**

I build tools and models that help organizations plan smarter — turning data about people, capacity, and demand into decisions leaders can actually act on. Ten years leading workforce planning at Amazon, T-Mobile, and others. Now focused on building the next generation of forecasting tools that go beyond Excel.

[See my work →](portfolio/index.qmd){.btn .btn-primary}
[Read my writing →](blog/index.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-secondary}
:::

---

## Recent Writing

::: {.listing-recent}
:::

```{=html}
<!-- Recent posts will auto-populate here once you have posts -->
```

[All posts →](blog/index.qmd)

---

## Selected Projects

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
### [Seattle Ferry Finder](portfolio/seattle-ferry-finder/index.qmd)
A real-time ferry schedule tool for the Puget Sound. Built solo with AI assistance, deployed on AWS. The project that started my shift from analyst to builder.
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
### Coming Soon
Automated workforce capacity forecasting pipeline — Prophet + AutoGluon with API-fed inputs, deployed on AWS Lambda.
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
### Coming Soon
Supply chain reorder tool for small businesses — demand forecasting integrated with Google Sheets, zero manual steps.
:::

:::

[All projects →](portfolio/index.qmd)
